findings.title: Mobile product axis has partially offscreen Vault action
findings.issue_text: Make product-axis navigation horizontally scrollable with visible affordance, wrap at mobile, or collapse into a menu so Vault is not clipped at 390px.

findings.title: Global search is hidden at mobile width
findings.issue_text: Provide a visible mobile search trigger or move global search into the topbar overflow/drawer with keyboard focus support.

findings.title: Mobile secondary navigation exposes offscreen focusable action buttons
findings.issue_text: Constrain mobile secondary nav with scroll indicators, roving tabindex, or a drawer/tab pattern so offscreen actions are discoverable and focus order is coherent.

findings.title: Client denied/review guarded panels still expose enabled mutation affordance
findings.issue_text: Disable or hide mutation controls in Client denied/review panels and add explicit reason copy; keep API fail-closed tests as the security acceptance target.

findings.title: People directory denied/review guarded state remains a known gap
findings.issue_text: Forward ctx through PeopleHome/LegalPeopleWorkspace, render denied/review live-data state, and prove no protected People tokens are visible in denied/review contexts.

findings.title: Global search is hidden and not focusable at mobile width
findings.issue_text: Add a mobile-visible search affordance and focus target; verify with P3-T11 mobile focus smoke.

findings.title: Notification drawer does not keep focus within drawer during Tab smoke
findings.issue_text: Trap focus inside the notification drawer or close/return focus predictably; verify tab order and Escape close behavior.

findings.title: Korean locale mixes product-domain English labels with Korean navigation labels
findings.issue_text: Decide whether Client/Matter/Vault/People are protected product terms or Korean domain nouns, then make i18n/product-axis/sidebar labels consistent.

findings.title: Client guarded-state Korean copy embeds English product label in the sentence body
findings.issue_text: Align Client guarded-state copy with the decided domain naming policy and keep the denial/review reason readable in Korean.

findings.title: People denied/review copy cannot be reviewed because the guarded state is missing
findings.issue_text: After fixing the People guard-state runtime gap, add Korean denied/review copy and rerun guarded-state browser checks.

findings.title: Local synthetic fixture title is visible in Vault document samples
findings.issue_text: Keep synthetic fixture labels out of launch/customer-data claims or replace with clearly labeled demo data before any public or owner-ready screen capture.
